# ConfigMap that mounts the Sync-Addons.ps1 script into the processor Job container.
# The script is loaded from the scripts/ directory at kustomize build time via the
# configMapGenerator in kustomization.yaml.
#
# NOTE: This file is a placeholder. The actual ConfigMap is generated by the
# configMapGenerator in kustomization.yaml from scripts/Sync-Addons.ps1.
# If you are applying manifests without kustomize, create this ConfigMap manually:
#
#   kubectl create configmap addon-sync-script \
#     --from-file=Sync-Addons.ps1=scripts/Sync-Addons.ps1 \
#     -n k2s-addon-sync
